Heather says pottery differs from other art forms because
options: A. it lasts longer in the ground.
B. it is practised by more people.
C. it can be repaired more easily.
questions.correctAnswer: A. it lasts longer in the ground.

questions.question: Archaeologists sometimes identify the use of ancient pottery from
options: A. the clay it was made with.
B. the marks that are on it.
C. the basic shape of it.
questions.correctAnswer: B. the marks that are on it.

11 - 12 Which TWO things does the speaker say about visiting the football stadium with children?
options: A. Children can get their photo taken with a football player.
B. There is a competition for children today.
C. Parents must stay with their children at all times.
D. Children will need sunhats and drinks.
E. The café has a special offer on meals for children.
questions.correctAnswer: A. Children can get their photo taken with a football player.

questions.question: 11 - 12 Which TWO things does the speaker say about visiting the football stadium with children?
options: A. Children can get their photo taken with a football player.
B. There is a competition for children today.
C. Parents must stay with their children at all times.
D. Children will need sunhats and drinks.
E. The café has a special offer on meals for children.
questions.correctAnswer: B. There is a competition for children today.

questions.question: What does the woman say about using laptops to teach writing to children with dyslexia? A.Children often lack motivation to learn that way. B.Children become fluent relatively quickly. C.Children react more positively if they make a mistake. ## Page 5
questions.correctAnswer: C. Children react more positively if they make a mistake.

questions.question: When discussing whether to teach cursive or print writing, the woman thinks that A.cursive writing disadvantages a certain group of children. B.print writing is associated with lower academic performance. C.most teachers in the UK prefer a traditional approach to handwriting.
questions.correctAnswer: A. cursive writing disadvantages a certain group of children.

questions.question: According to the students, what impact does poor handwriting have on exam performance? A.There is evidence to suggest grades are affected by poor handwriting. B.Neat handwriting is less important now than it used to be. C.Candidates write more slowly and produce shorter answers.
questions.correctAnswer: A. There is evidence to suggest grades are affected by poor handwriting.

questions.question: What prediction does the man make about the future of handwriting? A.Touch typing will be taught before writing by hand. B.Children will continue to learn to write by hand. C.People will dislike handwriting on digital devices.
questions.correctAnswer: B. Children will continue to learn to write by hand.

questions.question: The woman is concerned that relying on digital devices has made it difficult for her to A.take detailed notes. B.spell and punctuate. C.read old documents.
How do the students feel about their own handwriting? A.concerned they are unable to write quickly B.embarrassed by comments made about it C.regretful that they have lost the habit
questions.correctAnswer: C. regretful that they have lost the habit
